caption: A man with a shaved head, a dark beard, and tattoos on his right arm sits in a studio with dark grey, ribbed acoustic foam panels in the background. He wears a plain white t-shirt and black over-ear headphones. A professional microphone is positioned in front of him, mounted on a boom arm that displays the text "Rodecaster Pro II". As the sequence progresses, the man is speaking, his mouth opening and closing as he looks slightly to the left of the camera. His facial expressions shift slightly from a neutral gaze to a more animated expression as he talks. By the end of the sequence, he begins to gesture with his hands, which are partially visible at the bottom of the frame, while continuing to speak into the microphone.
